user.title: Set up openWB
user.description: Connect Home Assistant to an RS-485 serial bus for openWB devices.

error.invalid_serial_port: Serial port must not be empty.
error.invalid_baudrate: Baud rate must be a positive integer.
error.invalid_parity: Parity must be N, E, or O.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to open the serial port. Check the path, permissions, and that no other Modbus master is using this RS-485 bus.

abort.already_configured: This openWB serial bus is already configured.

user.title: Add WB-MR6C device
user.description: Add one WB-MR6C module on this RS-485 bus.

error.invalid_device_id: Device address must be an integer from 1 to 247.
error.duplicate_device_id: This bus already has a device with this address.
error.invalid_bus_config: The parent serial bus configuration is invalid. Remove and re-add the bus.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to communicate with the device at this address.
error.cannot_validate_device: The device returned an invalid model or firmware response.
error.unexpected_model: The device at this address is not a WB-MR6C module.

abort.already_configured: This device is already configured on this bus.
